creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Cochard from comment #18)

If you find a more appropriate solution, please revert my patch+commit a fix+bump PORTREVISION. (Should work on 13.3-R, 13.4-R, 14.0-R and 14.1-R at a minimum)

I had a number of emails about it and needed the build to succeed.
